transcript.text: Hi there! I'm your Launchpad immigration advisor, and I'm here to help you work through whatever visa or immigration challenge you're facing. What's your name and what's your company called?
My name is Abdul Majid, and my company's name is Motiboo.
Nice to meet you, Abdul. What stage is Motiboo at right now - are you pre-seed, seed, or further along?
I'm currently in.
I didn't catch that - what stage is your company at? Are you pre-seed, seed, Series A, or somewhere else?
Currently, I'd proceed.
I'm having trouble hearing your company stage clearly. Could you tell me again - is Motiboo pre-seed, seed, Series A, or at another stage?

Got it, let's move forward. What's your nationality, and what visa status do you currently have in the US?
My nationality is
Nigeria. And I don't have any status in The US currently.

Yeah. I'm looking to get a visa to The US.
What type of visa are you hoping to get, and is there any particular deadline you're working with?
Yes. Hits hit to v Visa.
I would love to get in by Wednesday.

I understand you're looking at an H-1B visa and need to get to the US by Wednesday - that's a very tight timeline. Have you already started working with an immigration attorney or filed any paperwork for this?
No.
This is affecting your business operations right now - can you tell me how not being able to get to the US is impacting Motiboo?
Yes. I would love to get get
to hire developers. And since I'm not there currently, it's affecting the business.
I understand - being unable to hire developers in the US is definitely impacting your growth. Have you ever had any visa denials, overstays, or other immigration issues in the past?
No. This is my first time.
Got it, this is your first US visa application. What would success look like for you - what's your ideal outcome here?
To be able to grow the business,
in a larger scale.

Thank you — I have everything I need to prepare a full brief for your immigration attorney. Give me just a moment.
